purpose: Define the first Galaxy Guardians reference conformance metric set by scoring the playable preview against the current Galaxian source profile, promoted semantic event log, game-owned runtime gates, and Platinum boundary rules.

sourceEvidence.notes: This is a first 0.1 metric model. It is intentionally conservative because most Galaxian evidence is still promoted from reviewed contact sheets and waveform windows rather than frame-level automated extraction.

summary.releaseRead: Useful development preview evidence, but local gameplay review showed that timing, pacing, and sprite fidelity are still not convincing enough for a public quick peek. The highest-leverage next work is frame-level Galaxian timing extraction, closer sprite extraction/authoring, acoustic cue comparison, and a real score-table/attract-language implementation.

metricScale.0: No implemented or measured relationship to the reference.
metricScale.5: Coarse semantic relationship exists, but evidence is mostly manual/internal.
metricScale.8: Runtime behavior is gated and traceable to committed reference evidence.
metricScale.10: Frame-level or acoustic reference measurement is automated and release-ready.

categories.label: Reference source coverage
categories.currentRead: Three Galaxian sources are committed with manifests, contact sheets, and waveform windows.
categories.remainingGap: Promote more windows into frame-level timing measurements.

categories.label: Promoted semantic event coverage
categories.currentRead: The preview covers the core runtime promoted events: formation entry, rack complete, dives, flagship/escort pressure, single-shot fire, shot resolution, and wrap/return.
categories.remainingGap: Attract mission text and score-advance-table behavior are not yet first-class playable-preview systems.

categories.label: Formation and rack timing
categories.currentRead: Formation entry, settle, rack complete, and first-dive delay are modeled and gated, with the quick peek adjusted to a tighter and calmer rack.
categories.remainingGap: Timing is still not derived from direct frame-level Galaxian extraction, so the score remains conservative.

categories.label: Movement and pressure model
categories.currentRead: Scout dives, flagship dives, escort joins, and wrap/return pressure are implemented and gated, and this pass slowed the first pressure cycle.
categories.remainingGap: Local play still reads as approximate; dive curves, lower-field traversal, and wave-to-wave pacing need direct measurement from the source videos.

categories.label: Single-shot threat and scoring
categories.currentRead: Single-shot firing, enemy shots, role-specific score values, player loss, and game-over behavior are implemented without Aurora capture/dual-fighter semantics.
categories.remainingGap: The Galaxian score table and level progression scoring are not yet fully modeled.

categories.label: Visual alien identity
categories.currentRead: Flagship, escort, scout, and player interceptor visuals are smaller and closer to Galaxian contact-sheet proportions while remaining distinct and gated.
categories.remainingGap: Sprites are still hand-authored preview approximations rather than extracted pixel-faithful reference assets.

categories.label: Audio character and reference fit
categories.currentRead: Runtime cue IDs and role-separated cue shapes are gated.
categories.remainingGap: This is the least reference-faithful Guardians area: acoustic comparison against Galaxian footage is not yet automated.

categories.label: Platform and game boundaries
categories.currentRead: The preview remains dev-only, does not inherit Aurora capture/dual/challenge/scoring mechanics, and uses Platinum only through shared capability boundaries.
categories.remainingGap: Keep this mandatory as Guardians gets more real gameplay.

categories.label: Evidence durability
categories.currentRead: The reference profile, event log, identity artifacts, and 0.1 gates are committed and rerunnable.
categories.remainingGap: Add a generated Guardians numeric score artifact per run once the metrics are less manually calibrated.

nextMetricPromotions: automated frame-level rack-entry timing from matt-hawkins-arcade-intro
automated dive-path extraction from arcades-lounge-level-5 and nenriki-15-wave-session
Galaxian score-advance-table implementation and scoring conformance
acoustic cue comparison against waveform windows
